'''Artillery''' units were mobile artillery units deployed on the battlefield by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

==Description==
[[File:RebelArtilleryAndHeavy.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Variations of Rebel artillery.]]
The self-propelled artillery moved on tracks rather than repulsors and came in two models, single- and double-barrelled.

==History==
A few units were used during the [[Reytha campaign|Occupation of Reytha]] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]].

{{Veh-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Artillery units appear in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' and its [[2002]] expansion pack [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|''Clone Campaigns'']].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]''
